holdings.infoBox: ADME is an equity ETF with a total of 162 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.82%, Apple at 6.74%, Alphabet at 6.01%, Microsoft at 4.60%, and Amazon.com at 3.72%.

overview.description: The Aptus Drawdown Managed Equity ETF (ADME) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed to select large-cap US stocks that exhibit positive fundamental and momentum characteristics combined with a downside hedge. ADME was launched on Jun 8, 2016 and is issued by Aptus Capital Advisors.
